description_long: This is a dark brown wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a flat top surface, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways. The front features four vertical doors, each equipped with metallic handles, and two lower drawers with matching handles for additional storage. One of the doors is distinguished by a large, light-colored rectangular panel, possibly a mirror or decorative glass insert. The cabinet stands on a flat base and has a solid, unadorned back and sides, indicating it is designed to be placed against a wall. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth, semi-gloss finish that highlights the wood grain. The handles and possible glass panel add a touch of modernity to its otherwise classic design.
description: A dark brown wooden cabinet with four doors, metallic handles, and a light-colored panel, featuring two lower drawers and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing four doors with metallic handles, two lower drawers, and a light-colored panel on the rightmost door.
description_view_1: Right angled view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the protruding top, and the side profile of the light-colored panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back with no visible handles, doors, or decorative features.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a featureless, flat side panel and the overhanging top surface.
